Module com.example.demo
Package com.example.demo.components

Class Order

java.lang.Object
com.example.demo.components.Order
public class Order extends Object
Java Class that makes an Order
Author:
Sofia Ortega, Josh Stafford

      Retrieves the size for the drink if applicable

      a String holding the drink size (small, medium large)
